96 I1Z I1Z_QUADRIPLEGIA 25f(I1z)Quadriplegia CHAR 1 Indicates a diagnosis of quadriplegia - paralysis (temporary or permanent impairment of sensation, funtction, motion ) of all four limbs. Usually caused by cerebral hemorrhage, thrombosis, embolism, tumor, or spinal cord injury. 0 = Unchecked, 1 = Checked, -1 = Unknown
97 I2E I2E_PNEUMONIA 26a(I2e)Pneumonia CHAR 1 Indicates a diagnosis of pneumonia - inflammation of the lungs; most commonly of bacterial
